name: Son Nguy
title: Product Engineer
resumeTitle: Senior Front-End Engineer | Product Engineering | Martech | Payment Systems
positioning: Product Engineer building Payments, Martech, Analytics, and Customer Experience products
summary: Product Engineer with 10+ years of experience building customer-facing products across fintech, AI SaaS, hospitality, and membership platforms.
resumeSummary: Senior Front-End Engineer with 10+ years of experience building web and mobile products across fintech, AI SaaS, hospitality, membership, and marketing technology. Specialized in payment systems, customer analytics, Martech integrations, and product-focused engineering with React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, and React Native. Experienced in owning business-critical features and collaborating across Product, Marketing, Design, QA, Backend, and Engineering teams.

career: 10+ years delivering customer-facing web and mobile products across fintech, AI SaaS, hospitality, membership, and Martech.
Owned frontend delivery for payment processing, deposit and withdrawal flows, customer analytics, and Martech integrations.
Integrated Stripe, PayPal, Trustly, WorldPay, PayNearMe, OnePay, TPBank, and OCB payment systems.
Implemented analytics and lifecycle platforms including Amplitude, GA4, GTM, Segment, Braze, AppsFlyer, Mixpanel, Customer.io, and PostHog.
Contributed to product planning, architecture, releases, incident response, technical interviews, and AI-assisted engineering workflows.

certifications.name: Microsoft Azure and Web Services Certification

hero.subheadline: I own customer-facing product delivery across fintech, AI SaaS, hospitality, and membership platforms.
hero.supportingCopy: My work spans payment and membership journeys, Martech and analytics foundations, product prototyping, and cross-functional delivery from requirements through release.

credibility.title: Product Engineering at a Glance
credibility.description: Business-critical experience across the systems that drive transactions, engagement, insight, and delivery.

philosophy.title: Building Products Where Technology Meets Business
paragraphs: The most valuable engineering work rarely exists in isolation.
It often sits at the intersection of customer needs, business objectives, product strategy, payments, analytics, and operational constraints.
I enjoy working across disciplines to help teams transform complex requirements into reliable customer-facing experiences that create measurable value for both users and businesses.

contact.title: Hiring for Product or Senior Front-End Engineering?
contact.copy: I'm open to roles where customer-facing product ownership, payments, Martech, analytics, and cross-functional delivery are central to the work.
